query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  MIN(periodoConcessivoFim) as min_conc_fim, 
  MAX(periodoConcessivoFim) as max_conc_fim,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataInicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_inicio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataSugeridaInicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_sugerida
FROM vacation_periods 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY status
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  MIN(periodoConcessivoFim) as min_conc_fim, 
  MAX(periodoConcessivoFim) as max_conc_fim,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataInicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_inicio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataSugeridaInicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_sugerida
FROM vacation_periods 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY status
